data.description:

An update from Trulieve Cannabis ( (TSE:TRUL) ) is now available.

Trulieve Cannabis Corp. announced its participation in the 27th Annual Needham Growth Conference in January 2025, where its Vice President of Investor Relations, Christine Hersey, will engage in presentations and investor meetings. This participation underscores Trulieve’s commitment to investor communication and highlights its active role in the cannabis industry, potentially impacting its market positioning and stakeholder relations.

More about Trulieve Cannabis

Trulieve is a leading vertically integrated cannabis company and multi-state operator in the U.S., with significant market presence in Arizona, Florida, and Pennsylvania. The company focuses on growth and expansion in retail and distribution through its hub strategy, offering high-quality cannabis products to enhance customer experiences.

data.description:

Mondi plc ( (GB:MNDI) ) just unveiled an update.

Mondi plc has announced transactions related to its Share Incentive Plan (SIP), which allows UK employees to purchase ordinary shares through salary deductions and receive free matching shares. The recent transactions involved acquisitions by the company’s Group CEO, Andrew King, and Group CFO, Mike Powell, which were conducted at the London Stock Exchange. This initiative reflects Mondi’s strategy to incentivize employee ownership and align interests with shareholders.

More about Mondi plc

Mondi plc is a multinational packaging and paper company incorporated in England and Wales. The company is known for its integrated business model, producing packaging and paper products with a market focus on sustainable solutions.

data.title: Completion of Mandatory Cash Offer for Vibropower Corporation
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Vibropower Corporation Limited ( (SG:BJD) ) has provided an update.

Vibropower Corporation Limited, a company based in Singapore, was subject to a mandatory conditional cash offer by Mr. Benedict Chen Onn Meng to acquire all issued and paid-up ordinary shares, excluding those already held by the Offeror. The offer, which included the acquisition of shares through exercised warrants, has officially closed as of January 9, 2025. This marks the completion of the acquisition process, effectively closing the window for any further acceptance of the offer, impacting the company’s shareholding structure significantly.

More about Vibropower Corporation Limited

data.title: Abcourt Mines Embarks on Strategic Drilling Campaign at Flordin Property
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Abcourt Mines ( (TSE:ABI) ) has provided an announcement.

Abcourt Mines Inc. has commenced a drilling campaign on its Flordin Property, aiming to explore potential gold deposits across two sectors. The initiative involves a minimum of 3,000 metres of drilling, targeting both shallow and deep gold mineralization. The campaign seeks to validate previous promising results and explore the continuity of high-grade gold mineralization, which could significantly impact the company’s resource estimates and position within the gold mining industry.

More about Abcourt Mines

Abcourt Mines Inc. is a company operating in the mining industry, primarily engaging in the exploration and development of gold properties. The company is focused on its properties in Canada, with a market emphasis on gold extraction and related mineral resources.

data.title: Northern 2 VCT PLC Launches £36 Million Share Offering for 2024/25
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Northern 2 VCT ( (GB:NTV) ) has shared an update.

Northern 2 VCT PLC, along with Northern Venture Trust PLC and Northern 3 VCT PLC, has released a prospectus for new ordinary shares to raise £36 million in the 2024/25 tax year. These offers will open on January 14, 2025, and are managed by Mercia Fund Management Limited, which will receive a percentage-based fee on the gross proceeds. Existing shareholders will receive a discount on offer costs, and Mercia will cover upfront costs and commissions. This initiative is expected to enhance the investment appeal of Northern 2 VCT PLC and strengthen its market position.

More about Northern 2 VCT

Northern 2 VCT PLC operates in the venture capital trust industry, focusing on providing investment opportunities through the issuance of new ordinary shares. It collaborates with Northern Venture Trust PLC and Northern 3 VCT PLC to offer these investment opportunities, primarily targeting investors looking for tax-efficient investment options in the UK.

The latest announcement is out from WH Smith ( (GB:SMWH) ).

Marathon Asset Management Limited has notified WH Smith PLC of an acquisition or disposal resulting in a voting rights threshold being crossed. As of January 7, 2025, Marathon Asset Management holds 5.015437% of voting rights in WH Smith through indirect holdings amounting to 6,515,804 shares. This change reflects Marathon’s control over a number of funds and accounts, although some shares remain without voting authority. Such a shift could influence WH Smith’s strategic directions or stakeholder dynamics.

data.title: Altius Minerals Sees Significant Growth in Junior Equities Portfolio and Strategic Investments
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Altius Minerals ( (TSE:ALS) ) has issued an update.

Altius Minerals Corporation reported a significant increase in the market value of its junior equities portfolio, reaching $60.4 million by the end of 2024, compared to $45.1 million the previous year. The company generated $26.4 million in proceeds through the monetization of certain equities, using $11.3 million for further investments, notably in Orogen Royalties Inc., and supporting its share buyback program. Altius continues to benefit from its strategic alliance with Orogen, with key developments at the Ermitano gold mine and the Silicon project in Nevada. Additionally, the acquisition of Adventus Mining Corp. by Silvercorp Metals positions Altius to benefit from future copper-gold production in Ecuador, while it maintains interests in other promising projects like Canstar’s Golden Baie and Tru Precious Metals’ Golden Rose in Newfoundland.

More about Altius Minerals

Altius Minerals Corporation operates within the mining industry, focusing on project generation and royalty interests. The company is engaged in the acquisition and management of mineral properties, with a particular emphasis on generating royalties from mining projects. Altius also maintains a portfolio of junior equities, demonstrating its involvement in various exploration and development ventures across multiple jurisdictions.

  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Nyrstar ( (GB:0RH8) ) just unveiled an update.

Nyrstar NV faces a legal proceeding initiated by a group of shareholders seeking provisional measures, involving current and former directors and associated entities. The Enterprise Court in Antwerp has postponed the substantive assessment of appointing a provisional administrator, citing pending investigations by the FSMA Sanctions Commission and other judicial bodies, indicating no current dysfunction in the company’s board.

data.title: PPHE Hotel Group Announces Leadership Change Amidst HR Claim
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

PPHE Hotel ( (GB:PPH) ) has shared an announcement.

PPHE Hotel Group has announced a change in its board of directors as Eli Papouchado steps down from his role as Non-Executive Chairman amidst an HR-related claim. Ken Bradley will take over as the new Chairman. Papouchado, who has been instrumental in the company’s growth since its inception, is contesting the claim, which involves a company outside of the PPHE Group. This leadership change is significant given Papouchado’s long-standing influence in expanding PPHE’s hotel brands across Europe.

More about PPHE Hotel

PPHE Hotel Group is an international hospitality real estate company with a portfolio valued at £2.2 billion, primarily consisting of prime freehold and long leasehold assets in Europe. The company develops, owns, and operates hotels and resorts, including upscale and lifestyle hotels, and holds an exclusive license from the Radisson Hotel Group for Park Plaza® branded properties in Europe, the Middle East, and Africa. PPHE also owns and operates the art’otel® brand and has a controlling interest in Arena Hospitality Group.
